name: FastMoBa
short_description: Fast offline solo MOBA — intense 8-minute battles!
detailed_description:
RoadMap Development

🔥 What's Next for FastMoBa? 🔥

The arena is evolving! We're constantly building on the foundation of the ultimate short-session MOBA, and here’s a look at the major updates already live and what's coming soon.

New Features (Now Live!)

  • The Classic 5v5 Arena: The game has been upgraded from 3v3 to the full 5v5 experience. Get ready for bigger, more intense team fights with even more bots to command.

  • Jungle Role: A true MOBA needs a jungle! You can now dive into the shadows, hunt monsters, and dominate the map with this strategic new role.

  • Team Call Function: Your bots just got smarter! Use the new team call function to issue commands and watch your AI allies execute your strategy.

Epic Updates on the Horizon

  • Tournament Mode: Prove your skills and compete for glory! An offline tournament mode is coming, where you can battle to become the ultimate champion.

  • Player Info Board: Analyze every move like a pro. A new info board will give you real-time access to every player and bot's stats, gear, and levels.

  • Passive Skills: Add a new layer of strategy to your hero with unique passive abilities that will change the way you play.

  • More Maps: Get ready for new battlegrounds! Fresh maps are being developed to keep the gameplay unpredictable and exciting.

Don't Wait to Join the Fight! As we add these major new features, the game's price will increase. Grab FastMoBa now to lock in the lowest price and grow with the game!


About the Game

⚔️ FastMoBa: The 8-Minute MOBA

Sick of long, drawn-out matches? FastMoBa delivers intense, tactical 5v5 MOBA battles that are over in just 8 minutes. It's the perfect competitive fix for players who are short on time but big on strategy.

🎮 Quick Matches, Deeper Strategy

Jump into the arena with four intelligent AI teammates. You can change their playstyle and give them commands to match your strategy. Just as you work with your team, enemy bots can call for ganks and counter-ganks, so be ready for a real challenge.

Crush the enemy team with:

  • 15 unique skins to express your style

  • 24 powerful skills to build your hero

  • 55 items to customize your play With regular content updates, no two matches will ever feel the same.

🌲 Jungle Fights & Power Plays

Secure the advantage by hunting down 8 evolving jungle monsters. The longer the match goes on, the tougher these beasts become. Take them down to turn the tide of battle in your favor.

💀 High Risk, High Reward

Every choice matters, and every death has consequences:

  • You only get 3 lives per match.

  • There's a 50% chance you'll drop an item on death. You could lose it all or get stronger by killing your enemies.

  • You lose 25% of your gold when you respawn. Play smart, or pay the ultimate price.

❤️ Built by a Solo Dev, Shaped by You

As a passionate solo developer, I've built FastMoBa with player feedback at its core. Your reviews are crucial and will help shape the future of this ultimate short-session MOBA. Thank you for your support!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Vietnamese
